# GitHub Repository Description

## Short URL Description (1 line)
Policy Rule Impact Simulation & Audit Governance System with manual & agent modes

## Full Repository Description (for GitHub About section)

Simulate how pricing rules affect your entire insurance portfolio in under 100ms. IRIS provides both a Manual evaluation interface and autonomous Agent mode for rule governance. Every decision is deterministic, auditable, and compliance-validated. Includes local Qwen 7B for decision explanations.
